channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Armed man shot and killed after entering secure perimeter of Mar-a-Lago, Secret Service says
item.description: U.S. Secret Service announced Sunday that an armed man was shot and killed after entering the secure perimeter of Mar-a-Lago, President Donald Trump’s resort in Palm Beach, Fla. Although Trump often spends weekends at his resort, he was at the White House during this incident.

item.title: Blizzard warnings send East Coast scrambling to prepare for heavy snow and strong winds
Crews recover bodies of 9 backcountry skiers days after California avalanche
